meaning: adj.不唐突的,不多嘴的,客气的,谦虚的
examples: The service at the hotel is efficient and unobtrusive.
The coffee table is glass, to be as unobtrusive as possible.
This refined attention to detail perfectly suits the small 12-seat Japanese bar and its unobtrusive hospitality.
Ultimately, implanted monitors will become so unobtrusive that even healthy people may want them.
